name: Pasta with White Beans and Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 oz Light-style ham, thinly sliced, cut into 1/4-by-1-inch strips
1 can Italian white beans (16 oz), rinsed and dried
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or saucepan, heat the olive oil over moderate-to-high heat.
2. Add the garlic and onion, stirring occasionally until they begin to brown, about 3 to 5 minutes.
3. Add the ham and cook for another minute.
4. Stir in the reduced chicken broth and simmer gently until just bubbling.
5. Add the Italian white beans and tomato paste, then season with sugar and dried oregano.
6. Break up any large tomatoes and stir everything together.
7. Allow the sauce to simmer until it thickens but remains slightly liquid, about 15 minutes.
8. Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
9. Drain the pasta and add it to the skillet with the sauce, tossing gently to combine.
10. Serve immediately over the cooked pasta.
